evals.prompt: Write a 2000-word blog post about sustainable coffee packaging for an eco-friendly coffee brand called GreenBean
evals.expected_output: A complete 10-phase pipeline execution producing a fact-checked, brand-compliant, SEO-optimized article with inline citations

assertions.text: Pipeline executes all 10 phases in correct order (Research → Fact Check → Draft → Visual → Validate → Structure → SEO → Humanize → Review → Output)
Output includes inline citations from verified sources with URLs
SEO metadata is present: title tag, meta description, schema markup suggestions
No hallucinated statistics — all data points have source attribution
Reviewer score is 7.0 or above across all 5 dimensions

evals.prompt: Create a whitepaper on AI-powered clinical trial recruitment for a pharma company
evals.expected_output: A fact-checked whitepaper with industry knowledge pack calibration (pharma), domain-specific validation, visual asset annotations, and strict evidence standards

assertions.text: Industry knowledge pack (pharma) is loaded and SME calibration is applied in Phase 3
Domain-specific validation in Phase 4 checks regulatory compliance and terminology accuracy
Visual Asset Annotator (Phase 3.5) generates chart specifications from verified data
Content uses appropriate pharma terminology without oversimplification

evals.prompt: Write an FAQ page about home loan refinancing for a financial services brand
evals.expected_output: A structured FAQ with verified financial data, regulatory compliance (BFSI knowledge pack), and appropriate disclaimers

assertions.text: BFSI industry knowledge pack is loaded for financial content calibration
FAQ schema markup is included in SEO output
Financial disclaimers are present where required
All interest rates and financial figures cite authoritative sources
